title: Lines written in an Album.
content:
With beauty and grace that greet the eye,
            How pleasing 'tis to trace,
        Within, the beauty of holiness, -
            That higher, heavenly grace!
meaning:
"Lines written in an Album." is a quintessential example of W. M. MacKeracher's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
